scripts.build:doctrine: pnpm --dir web/packages/a11oy-connection build && pnpm --dir web/packages/a11oy-core build
scripts.typecheck:doctrine: pnpm --dir web/packages/a11oy-connection build && pnpm --dir web/packages/a11oy-connection typecheck && pnpm --dir web/packages/a11oy-core typecheck
scripts.payload:bundle: pnpm build:doctrine && pnpm payload:manifest && pnpm payload:huggingface && python3 scripts/build_operational_payload.py
